offspring.diff: Added conditional length-advantage gate: combat takes priority only when strictly longer; otherwise space_control becomes primary move, with explicit dead-end veto (reachable < 4) to address weak win-rate vs strong opponents.
Added food-denial / length-race concept: when longer, intercept food to prevent opponent length-reversal; when shorter, eat first before engaging in head-to-head confrontation.
Added 'combat' specialist to improve win-rate vs strong/moderate opponents by avoiding head-on collisions and exploiting size advantages
Increased refine_rounds from 2 to 3 to add an extra self-critique pass, targeting the weak strong-rung win-rate (0.30).
